name: OBLITACRATER
short_description: Dive into an action-packed shoot 'em up where every drop onto the planet is a high-stakes gamble. Fight through endless waves of increasingly deadly alien monsters while collecting powerful upgrades to aid you in battle. You can escape at any time, but beware — death resets your score to zero!
detailed_description:
OBLITACRATER is a twin stick shooter where you fight endless alien monsters in increasingly difficult waves on a cute little planet!

There is only one goal in OBLITACRATER, increase your score. Each DROP to the planet adds to a single running score. You can end the drop at any time by pressing the BIG RED BUTTON at the top of of the planet which also locks in your score and adds it to your total. There is no end to the number of waves in OBLITACRATER. You last as long as you dare and then get out!

NOW HERE IS THE REALLY MEAN PART!!! IF YOU DIE, YOUR RUNNING SCORE RESETS TO ZERO. YOUR LEADERBOARD ENTRY RESETS TO ZERO and you are back to square one. Each time you drop to the planet surface, you risk your entire score, every time.

While surviving on the planet surface you have the opportunity to unlock upgrades for your ship. These range from stat boosts like increased move speed to secondary fire modes like rocket launchers, mines or laser bursts. You can also choose to unlock random upgrades, but be warned not all upgrades are friendly.

There is no end in OBLITACRATER so remember, ESCAPE! ESCAPE!!! ESCAPE!!!!

Gameplay Features

  • 10 Horrifying (and yet oddly cute) alien critters to blast!

  • Ranked, Friends and Timed Leaderboards

  • 50 unique upgrades

  • A range of high powered weaponry including Rockets, Lasers and Mines

  • Fast paced movement and dodging

  • Smooth Traversal on a full 3D spherical planet

  • Support for hundreds of enemies on screen

  • Dead Run Mode

About The DEV

OBLITACRATER IS A SMALL GAME MADE BY A SOLO DEV
